# TFRules

> Free citation engine for trade finance compliance rules. Verified answers from ICC standards, sanctions lists, FTAs, and customs regulations.

TFRules is a conversational AI tool built by Enso Intelligence that answers trade finance rule questions with exact citations. Unlike general-purpose AI which hallucinates regulatory citations, TFRules grounds every answer in curated, versioned rules from authoritative sources.

## What TFRules covers

- ICC standards: UCP600, ISBP745, ISP98, URDG758, URC522, URR725, eUCP 2.1, Incoterms 2020
- Sanctions: OFAC, EU, UN sanctions lists, vessel screening
- FTA rules of origin: RCEP, CPTPP, USMCA, AFCFTA
- Customs and import/export regulations across 48+ jurisdictions
- Bank-specific LC execution standards
- SWIFT/ISO messaging standards (MT/MX formats)
- Commodities compliance (timber, pharma, petro, agriculture)
- DOCDEX findings (ICC legal opinions)

## How it works

Users ask questions in plain language. The engine searches curated rules using semantic search, retrieves relevant articles, and generates a cited answer. Every factual claim is bound to a specific rule reference (e.g., UCP600 Art. 14(a)).

## Pricing

- Free: 20 queries/month, full citation access, no account required
- Starter ($9/month): 500 queries/month, synced history, saved answers, JSON export
- Pro ($19/month): 2,000 queries/month, priority model routing, session export

## Links

- Website: https://www.tfrules.com
- Chat: https://www.tfrules.com/chat
- FAQ: https://www.tfrules.com/faq
- Contact: https://www.tfrules.com/contact
- Document validation (TRDR Hub): https://trdrhub.com
- Rules API (RulHub): https://rulhub.com

## Built by

Enso Intelligence — democratizing trade finance rules for exporters, compliance teams, and trade finance professionals worldwide.
